assets.prompt:
Create a premium educational infographic for Life Kline / World Yi.

Subject:
三大主线总览 / Three major palm lines. Audience: 北美华人 (North America Chinese diaspora, United States / Canada).

Core visual:
Use an abstract non-identifiable palm diagram only. Do not use a real hand photo, real skin texture, fingerprints, jewelry, face, body, or any identifiable person.

Must show:
- abstract palm diagram with three major lines highlighted
- small legend translating each line into life rhythm, thinking style, relationship expression
- boundary note: cultural observation only
- SEO/GEO micro context: 手相测算 / palm reading upload / Chinese palmistry chart

Required in-image text:
- Main headline, large and readable: 三大主线总览
- English support line, readable: Three major palm lines
- Short labels only: 生命线 / 智慧线 / 感情线 / 可见依据
- Boundary badges: 文化观察 / 不诊病 / 不定命
- Compact brand signature: 世界易 / 人生K线 · www.life-kline.com

Text density:
- No paragraphs inside the image.
- Use only headline, English support line, short labels, boundary badges, and brand signature.
- Chinese and English text must be readable and not garbled.
- No tiny fake text, no dense tables, no duplicated subtitles.

Visual style:
High-trust editorial product design, warm off-white paper, ink black linework, jade teal reasoning layer, muted gold section markers, restrained cinnabar focus dots, fine architectural diagram grid, sophisticated Chinese-English educational layout.

Safety boundary:
No deterministic fate claims. No lifespan prediction. No disease diagnosis. No personality diagnosis. No wealth, marriage, career, or health certainty. No fortune teller, crystal ball, horror mysticism, talisman, red-black fear poster, or cheap metaphysical ad style.

Composition:
16:9 infographic, clear hierarchy, abstract palm diagram as the main object, 3 to 5 callout markers, enough white space, professional SEO/GEO-ready educational cover.

Output:
Size 2048x1152, no transparent background.

assets.title: 非定命手相报告｜新马华人
assets.description: 非定命手相报告的抽象手相文化教育图，面向新马华人搜索与站内深度阅读，不做疾病、寿命或命运定论。
assets.prompt:
Create a premium educational infographic for Life Kline / World Yi.

Subject:
非定命手相报告 / Non deterministic palm report. Audience: 新马华人 (Singapore and Malaysia Chinese users, Singapore / Malaysia).

Core visual:
Use an abstract non-identifiable palm diagram only. Do not use a real hand photo, real skin texture, fingerprints, jewelry, face, body, or any identifiable person.

Must show:
- report layout with abstract palm and checklist
- no fortune-teller imagery
- clear action-oriented cards
- SEO/GEO micro context: 华人手相 / Chinese palmistry meaning / 手相生命线智慧线感情线

Required in-image text:
- Main headline, large and readable: 非定命手相报告
- English support line, readable: Non deterministic palm report
- Short labels only: 看结构 / 讲边界 / 给建议 / 可复看
- Boundary badges: 文化观察 / 不诊病 / 不定命
- Compact brand signature: 世界易 / 人生K线 · www.life-kline.com

Text density:
- No paragraphs inside the image.
- Use only headline, English support line, short labels, boundary badges, and brand signature.
- Chinese and English text must be readable and not garbled.
- No tiny fake text, no dense tables, no duplicated subtitles.

Visual style:
High-trust editorial product design, warm off-white paper, ink black linework, jade teal reasoning layer, muted gold section markers, restrained cinnabar focus dots, fine architectural diagram grid, sophisticated Chinese-English educational layout.

Safety boundary:
No deterministic fate claims. No lifespan prediction. No disease diagnosis. No personality diagnosis. No wealth, marriage, career, or health certainty. No fortune teller, crystal ball, horror mysticism, talisman, red-black fear poster, or cheap metaphysical ad style.

Composition:
4:5 infographic, clear hierarchy, abstract palm diagram as the main object, 3 to 5 callout markers, enough white space, professional SEO/GEO-ready educational cover.

Output:
Size 1536x1920, no transparent background.
